verdict: Crabtree & Evelyn leverages traditional goat milk and honey for natural hydration and soothing properties. The botanical-forward approach appeals to consumers seeking heritage craftsmanship over modern actives.

_research.name: Crabtree & Evelyn Goatmilk & Honey Body Lotion
_research.con: Lacks contemporary anti-aging actives like retinol or vitamin C for forward-thinking skincare.
